ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Insights & Updates
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you’re doing well. Here’s what’s happening this week:

- New product launch: <URL>
- Upcoming webinar on digital trends: <URL>
- Exclusive offer for loyal customers: <URL>

Feel free to reach out if you’d like to discuss these opportunities further.

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet is Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet and have temporarily suspended it to protect your assets. To restore full access, please verify your identity by following the secure link below:

<URL>

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in permanent loss of funds. This is a mandatory security measure.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Wallet Security Team
